allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Next.js:', d['dependencies'].get\('next',''\)\); print\('React:', d['dependencies'].get\('react',''\)\); print\('Deps:', ', '.join\(sorted\(d['dependencies'].keys\(\)\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('type:', d.get\('type', 'NOT SET'\)\)")
